brand.tag: hear it · spell it · keep the chain
settings.title: Settings
settings.kidSmall: Bigger text, friendly words, no prices
settings.remindSmall: One gentle nudge a day to practice
settings.remindTimeSmall: When to send the daily nudge
error.offline: You're offline — leaderboard and head-to-head need a connection.
card.accuracyEmpty: Spell a few words to start tracking your accuracy by difficulty.
card.boardEmpty: No chains yet — be the first to start one.
import.title: Bring your own words
import.blurb: Practice the exact words you keep getting wrong — paste text, type a list, or pull from a link.
ph.importText: Paste any text or a list of words here…
import.note: Words stay on this device. Fetching a link can be blocked by the site — if it fails, copy the text and paste it above.
age.title: When's your birthday?
age.blurb: We ask so we can show the right experience.
parent.title: Ask a grown-up
parent.question: What is {a} times {b}?
vs.title: Head-to-head
vs.blurb: Two players, one device. Take turns spelling — a miss ends your turn. The longest chain wins.
vs.leaveBlurb: The head-to-head match will end and you'll return to the solo game. The current chains won't be saved.
auth.createBlurb: Post your best chains to The Climb. Your email is used only to verify your account and reset your password — never shown to anyone.
acct.title: Your account
acct.deleteSmall: Removes your account and all Climb entries. This can't be undone.
fb.noMisses: No misses yet — they collect here as you play.
fb.allCaughtOne: All caught up — 1 word scheduled for later review.
fb.allCaughtMany: All caught up — {n} words scheduled for later review.
toast.loginToPost: Log in to post your chain to The Climb.
toast.newRecord: New record! Posted to The Climb — #{rank} on {difficulty}.
fb.gotItReview: Got it — scheduled to return later.
daily.title: Daily
draw.almost.mirror: So close! That letter is facing the wrong way — try flipping it around.
draw.almost.oneLetter: Almost! One letter looks off — check your spelling.
draw.tryAgain: Not quite — give it another go!
draw.empty: I don't see a word yet — write it on the pad!
help.howItWorks: How it works: press the orb to hear a word, then type, speak, or draw its spelling — a meaning appears after each answer, and misses return over days under ↻ Misses. Everything is free. English words are read aloud by your word server; import your own under ＋ My words to practice anything, spoken with your browser's voices — smoothest in Chrome or Edge on a computer. Progress is saved in this browser only.
voice.audioFail: Couldn't reach the audio server for this word — spelling still counts.
age.badDate: Please pick a real date that isn't in the future.
draw.readingFirst: Reading your writing… (first use loads the reader)
draw.unreadable: Couldn't read that — try clearer block letters, or type it.
draw.readerFail: The handwriting reader couldn't load here — type the letters to check.
draw.readerFailSaved: The handwriting reader couldn't load here — your writing is saved; type the letters to check.
draw.prompt: Write the word, then tap “Read my writing”.
draw.needWord: Press the orb for a word, then write it.
draw.needStrokes: Write a word on the pad first.
import.noWords: No words found at that link.
import.fetchFail: Couldn't fetch that link (the site may block it). Copy the text and paste it above instead.
import.needWord: Add at least one word to save.
speech.noVoice: This browser can't speak — try Chrome or Edge.
meaning.noDef: No definition found for this word.
meaning.noExample: No example sentence found for this word.
